keyEvents.text: Goal!  Antigua and Barbuda 0, Puerto Rico 1. Wilfredo Rivera (Puerto Rico) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Darren Ríos.
Kieron Richards (Antigua and Barbuda) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Puerto Rico. Ian Silva replaces Rubén Tapia.

Substitution, Puerto Rico. Joel Burgos replaces Isaac Angking.
Goal!  Antigua and Barbuda 2, Puerto Rico 3. Wilfredo Rivera (Puerto Rico) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Juan O'Neill.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. Ashley Nathaniel-George replaces TJ Bramble.

Second Half ends, Antigua and Barbuda 2, Puerto Rico 3.
